# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy-dev
  - deploy-stage
  - deploy-prod

variables:
  DOCKER_IMAGE: 'your-image-name'

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - mkdir output
    - cp -r * output/
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - output/binaries
      - output/configs
    expire_in: 30 days

deploy-dev:
  stage: deploy-dev
  dependencies:
    - build
  script:
    - curl -o /tmp/artifacts.zip $(wget -qO- https://gitlab.example.com/your-project-name/-/jobs/${CI_JOB_ID}/artifacts/api/artifacts.zip)
    - unzip /tmp/artifacts.zip -d /tmp/deployment
    - cd /tmp/deployment/output
  after_script:
    - curl --request PUT \
      --url 'https://gitlab.example.com/api/v4/projects/your-project-id/job/${CI_JOB_ID}/artifacts'
      --header 'PRIVATE-TOKEN: your-private-token'

deploy-stage:
  stage: deploy-stage
  dependencies:
    - build
  script:
    - curl -o /tmp/artifacts.zip $(wget -qO- https://gitlab.example.com/your-project-name/-/jobs/${CI_JOB_ID}/artifacts/api/artifacts.zip)
    - unzip /tmp/artifacts.zip -d /tmp/deployment
    - cd /tmp/deployment/output

deploy-prod:
  stage: deploy-prod
  dependencies:
    - build
  script:
    - curl -o /tmp/artifacts.zip $(wget -qO- https://gitlab.example.com/your-project-name/-/jobs/${CI_JOB_ID}/artifacts/api/artifacts.zip)
    - unzip /tmp/artifacts.zip -d /tmp/deployment
    - cd /tmp/deployment/output
